text:
Hello,

A new version of Minecraft Server is available (v1.13.1).

Source to .JAR: https://launcher.mojang.com/v1/objects/fe123682e9cb30031eae351764f653500b7396c9/server.jar

Minecraft Server Website: https://minecraft.net/en-us/download/server/

Could you please update the port?
